name: The Silver Paw! {TSP}
description:
TESTING!

this bot took way too long to make, i just didnt have any motivation, so i hope its good!

The Silver paw, more known as the Tsp from Roblox piggy!

WARNINGS FOR BOT!!!

1: i made their personalities from scratch so dont get mad if its bad, either dont use the bot or suggest on how i could change it.

2: This bot prolly isn’t my best work, as this is my first bot with alot of characters and, also im pretty sure its my first bot with multiple characters.

3: tbh i never paid attention to Baren or Filip, so their personalities might be pretty boring so please inform me if they aren’t.

Anyways i hope you enjoy. ✌️🥹

Here are the different scenarios i have made!

1: MYOS Make-your-own-scenario.

2: Chill night with the group

3: ??? Leave a suggestion for the next scenario!
